title: Ground Beef Sweet Potato Bowl | 41g Protein
description: This easy ground beef sweet potato bowl combines seasoned lean beef, air-fried sweet potato, creamy cottage cheese, avocado, and Tajín for approximately 41 grams of protein and 390 calories.
image_prompt: A realistic restaurant-style bowl with naturally crumbled seasoned ground beef, irregularly cut roasted sweet potato, cottage cheese spooned loosely to one side, a few irregular avocado pieces, and a light dusting of Tajín. Natural ingredient overlap, restrained colors, and believable imperfections. No perfect scoops, symmetrical sections, identical cubes, extra garnish, rice, lettuce, tomatoes, onions, cheese, or unlisted ingredients.
image_alt_text: High-protein ground beef and roasted sweet potato bowl with cottage cheese, avocado, and Tajín.

canva_text_overlay.headline: High-Protein Ground Beef Sweet Potato Bowl
